name: Hou Delete Node
description: Delete a node from the live Houdini session by its path.
python_code:
async def execute(self, inputs):
    from src.utils.hou_bridge import get_bridge

    path = inputs.get('node_path') or self.get_parameter('node_path', '')
    if not path:
        self.log_error('No node path specified')
        await self.set_output('success', False)
        await self.set_output('exec_out', True)
        return {'success': False}

    try:
        bridge = get_bridge()
        bridge.delete_node(path)
        self.log_info(f'Deleted Houdini node: {path}')
        await self.set_output('success', True)
    except Exception as e:
        self.log_error(f'Failed to delete node: {e}')
        await self.set_output('success', False)

    await self.set_output('exec_out', True)
    return {'success': self.get_parameter('success', False)}
